skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem:
y = −(1/6)x

y = (1/4)x

The solution to the given system of equations is (x, y). What is the value of x?
rationale: Setting the right-hand sides equal: −(1/6)x = (1/4)x. Multiplying by 12: −2x = 3x, so −5x = 0 and x = 0. The correct answer is choice A.
